question: Clone the ansible-examples GitHub repository into a directory named ansible-project in your home folder.
validation_script:
#!/bin/bash
if [ -d "$HOME/ansible-project" ] && [ -d "$HOME/ansible-project/.git" ]; then exit 0; else exit 1; fi

question: Inside the cloned ansible-project directory, create a directory named playbooks.
validation_script:
#!/bin/bash
if [ -d "$HOME/ansible-project/playbooks" ]; then exit 0; else exit 1; fi

question: Create the nested directory inventories/lab inside the ansible-project directory.
validation_script:
#!/bin/bash
if [ -d "$HOME/ansible-project/inventories/lab" ]; then exit 0; else exit 1; fi

question: Create a directory named group_vars inside the ansible-project directory.
validation_script:
#!/bin/bash
if [ -d "$HOME/ansible-project/group_vars" ]; then exit 0; else exit 1; fi

question: Create a directory named host_vars inside the ansible-project directory.
validation_script:
#!/bin/bash
if [ -d "$HOME/ansible-project/host_vars" ]; then exit 0; else exit 1; fi

question: Create an ansible.cfg file in the root of the ansible-project repository with at least a [defaults] section.
hint: Touch ansible.cfg and add '[defaults]' inside it
validation_script:
#!/bin/bash
if [ -f "$HOME/ansible-project/ansible.cfg" ] && grep -q "^\[defaults\]" "$HOME/ansible-project/ansible.cfg"; then exit 0; else exit 1; fi

question: Create a requirements.yml file in the ansible-project root that includes the geerlingguy.nginx role.
validation_script:
#!/bin/bash
if [ -f "$HOME/ansible-project/requirements.yml" ] && grep -q "geerlingguy.nginx" "$HOME/ansible-project/requirements.yml"; then exit 0; else exit 1; fi
